title: Curious
why_this_song: Curious by Hayley Kiyoko (2018) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 24 times; first heard in: "If you let him touch ya, touch ya"
Appears 24 times; first heard in: "The way I used to, used to, used to, used to, used to, used to (Yeah)"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "I can handle things"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "But don't you worry I can handle it"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "But don't you worry I can handle it"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "touch" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "touch" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "used" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "used" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: No, don't you worry I can handle it
But don't you worry I can handle it

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You think of me, I'm what you see
If you let him touch ya, touch ya

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Curious" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Curious" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Curious" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Curious" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Curious" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Curious"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
